title: The Sins of our Fathers: Race, Religion, and the Rise of Trump
original_title: The Sins of our Fathers: Race, Religion, and the Rise of Trump
overview: When a devout Evangelical and staunch Republican has a life-altering encounter in an overlooked inner-city neighborhood, he begins to unravel the insidious political playbook that weaponized white Christian loyalty — and confronts the haunting truth that America's moral crisis traces back to its original sin.
